title: Chapter 82
content:
Chapter 82: Chapter 82: Status Update

Damon made his way toward the main residence, the soft crunch of gravel beneath his boots the only sound accompanying him through the quiet courtyard.

As he pushed open the doors, the warm atmosphere of the inner hall greeted him immediately.

There, settled together in a comfortable alcove bathed in the pale glow of afternoon light, were Ariel, Mio, and Mia, their voices mingling in pleasant conversation.

Ariel sat with her usual grace with her long dark blue hair draped over one shoulder like a curtain of silk while the twins flanked her on either side.

Curled neatly in Ariel’s lap, entirely unbothered by the world, was Neko in her small white tiger cub form.

The sight brought a quiet satisfaction to Damon’s golden eyes. He lingered in the doorway a moment, taking in the tranquillity of it all, before activating his Celestial Incubus Eyes to assess each of them in turn.

[Name: Ariel Aquaria]

[Age: 17]

[Cultivation: True Spirit Realm - Second Level]

[Relationship: Deeply in Love]

[Interest: 2500/5000]

[Chastity: Claim by Damon Arcknight]

[Lust: 0/100]

[Affinities: Water: 60, Spear: 50]

[Spiritual Roots: Sea Spiritual Roots] [Earth Grade - Peak]

[Bloodline: Blood of Sea Princess] [Mortal Grade - Low]

[Physique: Body of Sea Princess] [Mortal Grade - Low]

[Traits: Sensitive Body, Graceful, Young Lady, Kind, Loyal, Lustful]

In just a single week, Ariel had broken through to the Second Level of the True Spirit Realm — a rapid advancement made possible by the generous, high-quality Yang Qi that Damon had poured into womb for her cultivation every single day without fail.

’At this pace, Ariel will reach the Earth Spirit Realm within three months. That’s well ahead of schedule.’

The thought settled comfortably in his mind. The Eastern Continent Tournament loomed on the horizon like a distant storm, but with Ariel’s progress moving so smoothly, it was one less weight pressing on his shoulders.

He allowed himself a moment of quiet satisfaction before his luminous golden gaze drifted naturally to the twins seated on either side of her.

[Name: Mio Nightrider]

[Age: 23]

[Cultivation: Earth Spirit Realm - Seventh Level]

[Relationship: Deeply in Love]

[Interest: 1150/5000]

[Chastity: Claim by Damon Arcknight]

[Lust: 0/100]

[Affinities: Dark: 60, Bow: 50]

[Spiritual Roots: Void Spiritual Roots] [Earth Grade - Peak]

[Bloodline: Blood of Void Sniper] [Mortal Grade - Low]

[Physique: Body of Void Sniper] [Mortal Grade - Low]

[Traits: Cheerful, Natural Archer, Loyal, Airhead, Doting Big-Sister]

[Name: Mia Nightrider]

[Age: 23]

[Cultivation: Earth Spirit Realm - Seventh Level]

[Relationship: Deeply in Love]

[Interest: 1240/5000]

[Chastity: Claim by Damon Arcknight]

[Lust: 0/100]

[Affinities: Dark: 60, Dagger: 50]

[Spiritual Roots: Shadow Spiritual Roots] [Earth Grade - Peak]

[Bloodline: Blood of Shadow Queen] [Mortal Grade - Low]

[Physique: Body of Shadow Queen] [Mortal Grade - Low]

[Traits: Shy, Natural Assassin, Loyal, Intelligent, Close Pervert, Masochist]

Thanks to the sex marathon session they had before the Inner Disciple Test, both Mio and Mia had already pushed past the Sixth Level of Earth Spirit Realm.

And now the broke through into Seventh Level of Earth Spirit Realm.

’They must have absorbed the leftover of Yang Qi from our sessions while training under their mother.’ Damon mused as his gaze lingering on the twins.

Seeing all three of his women seated together, healthy, growing stronger, and devoted to him, Damon felt a rare warmth settle across his hearth.

His luminous golden eyes curved slightly at the corners, and a relaxed smile crossed his lips as he stepped fully into view.

"Hi, girls," he said.

The response was immediate. Both twins snapped their heads toward him at the same instant, their deep purple eyes lighting up with unmistakable recognition.

"Damon!" they called out together, their voices overlapping in perfect unison.

"What are you all doing out here?"

"Nothing important." Mio answered, her ponytail swaying as she tilted her head.

"We were just talking about our training routine."

"Is that so?" Damon replied, his eyes drifting lazily across all three of them.

"Then how about I refill you all with something a warm?" A sly smile curved the corner of his lips.

The words landed precisely as he intended them to. Mio and Mia understood immediately, the colour rushing to their pale cheeks in almost perfect unison, their deep purple eyes widening before darting away from his gaze.

Mio pressed her lips together tightly, as though that alone could contain her flustered embarrassment.

Mia’s reaction was subtler — a quiet, barely perceptible shift in her posture, her shy eyes dropping downward, though the pink staining her cheeks betrayed every thought crossing her mind.

Ariel, seated gracefully between them, did not blush at all.

Her vivid blue eyes simply curved with quiet amusement as she watched the twins flounder, one hand raised to her lips to cover the smile trying to bloom there.

"B-but..."Mio finally managed, her voice caught somewhere between wanting and propriety.

"We are inside Elder Selene’s residence. We just can’t... how about we return to our own quarters instead?" She framed it as a reasonable suggestion, though the faint tremor in her voice gave her away entirely.

Mia, seated quietly beside her sister, appeared to have skipped that internal debate altogether.

Her dark purple eyes slid sideways full of lust toward Damon. Where she didn’t care about the consequence to her whatsoever.

Looking at Mia reaction he couldn’t help but to aploud her inside his mind.

’As expected from a pervert.’

Then he turn toward Mio and walk toward her. Once he closed to her, he then grab her and lift her up in princess carry.

"Nope, We are going to do it here, Hehehe." Damon answer her suggestion with rejection.

"Bb-but..."

Damon the sealed her lips with a kiss.

"Don’t worry about it, Elder Selene is to busy on her training, she won’t even come in into the residence." He lied to Mio to tease Mio, but since he the only one to know that Selene always masturbate watching him had sex every night. There no difference at all.

After saying that, Damon began to walk toward Ariel’s room. Ariel and Mia just follow him without any question since Ariel already use to it while Mia just to horny to care.

Once the arrive at Ariel’s room Damon then toss Mio form his hand to the bed. He jump into the bed and began to strip her naked.

Then he fun foursome began again...
